comment_text: There's always a way. You may not like it, however, money is money. Even donating plasma can earn you a few hundred bucks a month. Second hand jobs are everywhere. If you're making X amount of dollars a month, which leaves you with very little disposable income from your job/s, maybe don't order doordash fifty times in a month. Maybe don't buy that expensive purse or game console. Maybe put your money into savings. Maybe don't buy a vehicle with a huge down payment and deferred, variable interest rate. comment_text: Well...a movie in which they're trying to make the idea of 'slut shaming' not a real thing...when it absolutely is. Anyone that does that type of work, or sells their body in any way deserves it and we need to stop acting like it's okay. You can always work harder. You can work 2 or 3 real jobs, even if they suck, they're boring and they're tedious. You do what you need to do, but when you sell your body, there is no going back and you are just gross. In 10 years there will be an army of children with ho-mom's that will be laughed at by other kids and they will tease each other over how they can just 'google' their mom's "activities" online from OF, or otherwise...ya, that'll totally be worth it. There is no going back from that stuff, so welcome to the internet, and forever being on there spreading your gross box and having multiple men take turns on you...real empowering. As opposed to working your ass off (not literally in this sense) by hustling, and using your brain...working hard and working 2-3 jobs while thinking of other ways to make money not through gross gross acts. You can be smart enough to know how to buy the things people desire and resell them online (a scalper is much better by MILES than a ho-bag), or just in general you can do this by finding hidden gems at garage sales, and being smart. I knew a person that was able to go to an estate sale of a lady that didn't know what she had, and my friend bought some coins from her, and they were worth over $10k. This isn't some common thing, but it's possible, and it doesn't have to be coins...just be smart, and go to places selling off things in which the people don't know what they have...but don't be a gross gross woman that will have her pictures forever on the internet and have her pictures available for all her kids' friends to see and make fun of them for in less than a decade, because that shit doesn't go away. Never stop slut-shaming, it's not something to be normalized, it's something to continue to be reminded of is unnacceptable.
